zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I di Visconti於1060年出生在義大利武恩布利亞培盧吉亞斯波萊托時，他的父親Eriprando Visconti20歲，母親Beatrice di Milano24歲。他和Lucretia di Stampa至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1111年在義大利拉其羅馬享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto I di Visconti于1060年出生在意大利武恩布利亞培盧吉亞斯波萊托时，他的父亲Eriprando Visconti20岁，母亲Beatrice di Milano24岁。他和Lucretia di Stampa至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1111年在意大利拉其羅馬享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I di Visconti was born in 1060, in Spoleto, Perugia, Umbria, Italy, his father, Eriprando Visconti, was 20 and his mother, Beatrice di Milano, was 24. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Lucretia di Stampa. He died about 1111, in Roma, Lazio, Italy, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I di Visconti est né en 1060, à Spoleto, Perugia, Umbria, Italie, son père, Eriprando Visconti, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beatrice di Milano, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Lucretia di Stampa. Il est décédé environ 1111, à Rome, Lazio, Italie, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto I di Visconti 1060 in Spoleto, Perugia, Umbria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eriprando Visconti 20 und seine Mutter Beatrice di Milano 24. Er hatte mit Lucretia di Stampa mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1111 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Roma, Lazio, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I di Visconti è nato il nel 1060 nel Spoleto, Perugia, Umbria, Italia, il suo padre, Eriprando Visconti, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice di Milano, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Lucretia di Stampa. Morì circa 1111, nel Roma, Lazio, Italia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto I di Viscontiが1060年にイタリアウンブリアペルジアスプオレトーで生まれた時，父Eriprando Viscontiは20歳，母Beatrice di Milanoは24歳であった。彼はLucretia di Stampaとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1111年にイタリアラズオロマで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto I di Visconti(이)가 1060년 이탈리아 브리아 페루지아 스포레토에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eriprando Visconti(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice di Milano(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Lucretia di Stampa(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1111년 이탈리아 라지오 로마에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I di Visconti nasceu em 1060, em Spoleto, Perugia, Umbria, Itália, seu pai, Eriprando Visconti, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice di Milano, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Lucretia di Stampa. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1111, em Roma, Lazio, Itália, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I di Visconti родился в 1060 г. в местности сполето, пиругя, умбря, Италия, его отцу по имени Eriprando Visconti было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice di Milano, 24. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Lucretia di Stampa. Он умер около 1111 г. в местности рома, лазио, Италия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto I di Visconti nació en 1060, en Spoleto, Perugia, Umbria, Italia, su papá, Eriprando Visconti, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Beatrice di Milano, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Lucretia di Stampa. Murió aproximadamente 1111, en Roma, Lazio, Italia, a la edad de 52 años.
